is a mook published by Poplar Sha on 09 July 2019. https://www.amazon.co.jp/-/en/dp/4591163377 

Overview

It is a book published on the tenth anniversary of the RADIO EVA. It is a catalog in of various clothing items made by RADIO EVA. Several illustrations feature Shinji Ikari, Asuka Shikinami Langley, Kaworu Nagisa, Rei Ayanami, and Mari Makinami Illustrious as models using the products sold by the brand.
